item.title: Telegram Domain Suspension
item.description: Telegram's shortlink domain suspended due to serverhold block

item.title: Windows Linux Security Deadline
item.description: A critical deadline is approaching for Windows and Linux security updates to protect against UEFI infections

item.title: NordVPN Sale: 75% Off + 3 Free Months
item.description: Get exclusive NordVPN coupons up to 77% off 2-year plans and 3 months free in June 2026, stay safe online with a secure VPN service.
